Profile: Personal Functioning and Engagement Condition Encounter Diagnosis Profile

Condition Asserted Date: 2025-05-03 14:40:00-0400

clinicalStatus: Active

verificationStatus: Confirmed

category: Power of muscles of one side of the body, Encounter Diagnosis

code: Right hemiparesis (disorder)

bodySite: Entire Right Arm

subject: Betsy Smith-Johnson

onset: 2025-05-03 11:30:00-0400

recordedDate: 2025-05-03 14:40:00-0400

recorder: PractitionerRole Emergency Medicine Physician

asserter: PractitionerRole Emergency Medicine Physician

note:

Patient began experiencing right sided weakness, primarily in arm and shoulder. There was no facial droop, but patient reports "tingling" in R face / numbness along R brow. Symptoms in face resolved post tPA administration. Strength improved in shoulder, weakness did not fully resolve. Demonstrates R arm weakness and lack of coordination. Fine motor skills significantly degraded and have not improved post tPA.

coding.display: Power of muscles of one side of the body
